headline: Kimmel's 'Expectant Widow' Roast ROASTS Melania 🔥👻, WH Fumes 😡🔫
text:
Jimmy Kimmel 🎤😈, late-night SLAYER 💀😂, DROPPED a THICC 🔥 'expectant widow' BOMB 💣 on Melania Trump 👩‍🦳💅 just DAYS before WHCD SHOOTING 😱🔫💥! In parody sketch, he roasted her GLOW ✨ like a 'beautiful expectant widow' 👻🤰 cuz Donnie's pushing 80 🧓🍆 while she's YOUNGER than Kimmel himself 😏📏 – light roast on that 23-YR AGE GAP 🕐🍑, not an ASSASSINATION CALL 📞🔪, bby! White House MELTDOWN 😤🚫, Melania X-rants ☕📱 'hateful VIOLENT words' 🤬💔, demands ABC FIRE his ass 🚫📺 like he's poisoning homes nightly 🏠☠️!

THREE DAYS LATER 💥⏰, gunman Cole Tomas Allen 🔫😈 (31yo edgelord 🤡) opens FIRE at WHCD gala 🥂🏨 where Trump & Melania chilling 👫🇺🇸 – tackled by agents 🕺💪 near staircase to BALLROOM 💃🕺 packed w/ journos & bigwigs! Trump evac'd UNHARMED 🛡️😅, calls it 'traumatic' for wifey 😢💔, suspect charged w/ ASSASSINATION ATTEMPT 🚨👮‍♂️ + weapon felonies 🔒 – no plea yet 🤐. Kimmel BACK on JKL monologue 🎙️ claps back: 'NOT violence incitement, I've HATED gunz FOREVER 🥊🔫 – start w/ convo w/ YOUR HUBBY Donnie about HIS rhetoric 🔥👴!' PUN GAME STRONG: 'Dial back hate? TALK TO TRUMP 👨‍🦳📢!'

Trump Truth Social RAGE-POSTS 📱💥: 'Kimmel's CALL TO VIOLENCE 😡🔪, FIRE HIM NOW Disney/ABC 🤑🚫!' Melania simping HARD for hubby 😍🛡️, 'corrosive comedy DEEPENS sickness 🤢🇺🇸!' Social media CONSERVA-CUCS 🤡🐸 RESURFACE clip 📹🔄, screaming 'TAKE KIMMEL OFF AIR 😤📴!' – echoes last Sept when he got PULLED for Charlie Kirk MAGA gang roast 🐂💥, reinstated quick cuz FREEDOM OF SPEECH 🗣️🇺🇸! Kimmel owns past 'ill-timed' Kirk jab 🤷‍♂️😔 but this? PURE ROAST COMEDY 🔥🍗, not a 'call to arms' pun intended 🦾💣!

WH urges ABC axe 🔪📺, but Kimmel THRUSTS BACK ⬆️😤: 'They KNOW it's a JOKE, not psychic prediction 🔮🔫!' Melania 'expectant widow' glow-up 👻✨ has Trump simps SWEATING 😰💦, while Kimmel's like 'HOLD MY MONOLOGUE 🍆🎤!' Political DRAMA ORGY 💦👯‍♂️ w/ late-night beef, assassination plots, and FIRST LADY SHADE 🕶️😏 – who's the REAL widow-maker here, Donnie's age or Kimmel's pen? 😂🪄💀 BBC poking ABC for deets 📰📞, but this FEUD's just GETTING THICC 🍑📈!
